title: Mount Fuji
description: Mount Fuji is the tallest mountain in Japan and one of the country's most iconic landmarks.

title: Sydney Opera House
description: The Sydney Opera House is a world-famous performing arts center and UNESCO World Heritage Site.

title: Geirangerfjord
description: Geirangerfjord is known for its dramatic cliffs, waterfalls, and breathtaking scenery.

title: Taj Mahal
description: The Taj Mahal is a magnificent marble mausoleum and one of the Seven Wonders of the World.
